name: python3-flask-sqlalchemy
title: python3-flask-sqlalchemy
summary: SQLAlchemy support to your Python 3 Flask application (Python3)
description:
SQLAlchemy support to your Python 3 Flask application (Python3)
Flask is a micro web framework for Python based on Werkzeug, Jinja 2 and good
intentions.
.
This python3 package adds SQLAlchemy support to Flask. The aim of SQLAlchemy
is to make accomplishing common tasks in Flask application easier by providing
useful defaults and extra helpers.
